item.title: Project Manager | Full time position
item.description: We’re hiring We’re a small, fully remote, globally dispersed, and profitable tech startup specializing in MDR, Red Team, and Incident Response.

item.title: Senior MDR Engineer | Full time position
item.description: We’re hiring We’re a small, fully remote, globally dispersed, and profitable tech startup with an MDR service specializing in highly technical clients.
